title: Schneider Electric Modicon M241, M251, and M262

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Schneider Electric Modicon M241, M251, and M262
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/20
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '5.4.10.12'
            - '5.4.13.12'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*00.pdf*'
            - '*2026-069-01.pdf*'
            - '*download.schneider-electric.com*'
            - '*www.se.com*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 5.4.10.12 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Schneider_Electric_Modicon_M24"; sid:5145997; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 5.4.13.12 any (msg:"CDB APEX — Schneider_Electric_Modicon_M24"; sid:4167399; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 5.4.10.12 any (msg:"CDB APEX Schneider_Electric_Modicon_M24"; sid:3112204; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 5.4.13.12 any (msg:"CDB APEX Schneider_Electric_Modicon_M24"; sid:9898154; rev:1;)
